subcodes.first_line: The esteemed Ḥakímbáshí sacrifices himself with utmost devotion in all affairs, striving in the path of God with his wealth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت حکیمباشی در جمیع شئون جانفشانی میفرمایند و یجاهدون فی سبیل الله باموالهم
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
